---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new analytical capability or engineering improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
Clear description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation & Use Case
Why is this needed? What analytical or engineering problem does it solve?

## Mathematical / Statistical Foundation
If applicable, provide the mathematical basis for the proposed model or method:
- Formula(s)
- Key assumptions
- Known limitations
- Relevant literature (citations)

## Proposed API

```r
# Proposed function signature
new_function <- function(x, param1, param2 = default) {
  # ...
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit tests verifying statistical correctness
- [ ] Documentation with formula derivation
- [ ] Integration with existing modules (if applicable)
- [ ] Example in README or notebook (if user-facing)

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches were considered and why this one is preferred.
